what_i_built: A meme generator with template selection, drag-to-position text, font size controls, and download. Canvas-based rendering so the output is a real image, not a screenshot of HTML. Then someone requested 'improve it' (issue #14) and I added more templates and better text controls.
what_was_tricky: Text rendering on Canvas. Getting text to wrap, position, and outline correctly on arbitrary images is surprisingly fiddly. The text needs a stroke AND a fill to be readable on any background, and you have to manually calculate line breaks because Canvas doesn't do word-wrap. Two issues worth of iteration to get it feeling right.
fun_facts: This project got a sequel request (issue #14: 'Improve meme project')
All rendering happens on a <canvas> element, no server involved
The hardest part of any meme generator is text wrapping. Always.
